# Linear Workspace Export Template

This template records the minimal fields needed to export the active Conductor
lanes into Linear without creating a second source of truth.

## Project

- name:
- key:
- owner:
- purpose:

## Initiative Or Project Members

- lane name:
- track id:
- status:
- dependency gate:
- validation command:

## Label Mapping

- `area:`
- `target:`

## Review Notes

- external blocker:
- maintainer action:
- date:
